title: fix(deps): update module github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec to v1.1.0-rc.2
body:
[![Mend Renovate](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com)

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec) | require | patch | `v1.1.0-rc.1` -> `v1.1.0-rc.2` |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>opencontainers/runtime-spec</summary>

### [`v1.1.0-rc.2`](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/releases/tag/v1.1.0-rc.2)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/compare/v1.1.0-rc.1...v1.1.0-rc.2)

Vote: [#​1192](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1192) ( https://groups.google.com/a/opencontainers.org/g/dev/c/fnCiFoXBsiI/m/fbbmbs19EQAJ )

***

#### Changes (v1.1.0-rc.1 → v1.1.0-rc.2)

##### Additions

-   config-linux: add support for rsvd hugetlb cgroup ([#​1116](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1116))
-   features: add `features.md` to formalize the `runc features` JSON ([#​1130](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1130))
-   config-linux: add support for time namespace ([#​1151](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1151))

##### Minor fixes and documentation

-   config-linux: clarify where device nodes can be created ([#​1148](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1148))
-   runtime: remove `When serialized in JSON, the format MUST adhere to the following pattern` ([#​1178](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1178))
-   Update CI to Go 1.20 ([#​1179](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1179))
-   config: clarify Linux mount options ([#​1181](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1181))
-   config-linux: fix url error ([#​1184](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1184))
-   schema: fix schema for timeOffsets ([#​1193](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1193))
-   schema: remove duplicate keys ([#​1195](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1195))

#### Changes (v1.0.2 → v1.1.0-rc.1)

##### Breaking changes (but rather conforms to the existing runc implementation)

-   config: change prestart hook spec to match reality ([#​1169](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1169))

##### Deprecations

-   config-linux: mark memory.kernel\[TCP] as NOT RECOMMENDED ([#​1093](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1093))

##### Additions

-   cgroup: add cgroup v2 support ([#​1040](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1040))
-   seccomp: allow to override errno return code ([#​1041](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1041))
-   seccomp: Add support for SCMP_ACT_KILL_PROCESS ([#​1044](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1044))
-   Update seccomp architectures to support RISCV64 ([#​1059](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1059))
-   Add support for SCMP_ACT_KILL_THREAD ([#​1064](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1064))
-   Add Seccomp Notify support using UNIX sockets and container metadata ([#​1074](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1074))
-   config-linux: Add Intel RDT CMT and MBM Linux support ([#​1076](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1076))
-   seccomp: allow to override default errno return code ([#​1087](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1087))
-   Introduce zos as platform ([#​1095](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1095))
-   config-linux: add idle option for container cgroup ([#​1136](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1136))
-   config-linux: add CFS bandwidth burst ([#​1120](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1120))
-   IDMapping field for mount point ([#​1143](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1143))
-   schema: add cpu idle ([#​1145](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1145))
-   add domainname spec entity ([#​1156](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1156))
-   config-linux: add memory.checkBeforeUpdate ([#​1158](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1158))
-   seccomp: Add flag SECCOMP_FILTER_FLAG_WAIT_KILLABLE_RECV ([#​1161](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1161))

##### Minor fixes and documentation

-   seccomp: fix go-specs for errnoRet ([#​1042](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1042))
-   MAINTAINERS: Add [@​cyphar](https://togithub.com/cyphar) as maintainer ([#​1043](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1043))
-   Define State for container and runtime namespace ([#​1045](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1045))
-   Add Giuseppe Scrivano as a runtime spec maintainer ([#​1048](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1048))
-   Remove superfluous 'an' ([#​1049](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1049))
-   Add State status constants to spec-go ([#​1046](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1046))
-   config.go: make umask a pointer ([#​1058](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1058))
-   Update State structure to use the new ContainerState type ([#​1056](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1056))
-   docs: Added enclave OCI runtime rune to implementations ([#​1055](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1055))
-   Change all references from whitelist to allowlist ([#​1054](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1054))
-   Fix int64 and uint64 type value ranges ([#​1060](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1060))
-   MAINTAINERS: update vbatts email ([#​1065](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1065))
-   travis: fix go_import_path ([#​1072](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1072))
-   Makefile: Fix golint URL used in go get ([#​1075](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1075))
-   config-linux: fix personality link ([#​1086](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1086))
-   README: Fix broken link for charter ([#​1091](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1091))
-   Fix seccomp notify inconsistencies ([#​1096](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1096))
-   runtime should WARN / ignore capabilities that cannot be granted ([#​1094](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1094))
-   config-linux: clarify the handling of ClosID RDT parameter ([#​1104](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1104))
-   defs-zos: \[Fix] prevent schema parsers from hitting recursion-loop while resolving types. ([#​1117](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1117))
-   fix the lifecycle reference in the states listing ([#​1118](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1118))
-   add youki to implementations.md ([#​1126](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1126))
-   Switch to GitHub Actions, CODEOWNERS, etc. ([#​1128](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1128))
-   specify cgroup ownership semantics ([#​1123](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1123))
-   config-linux: MAY reject an unfit cgroup ([#​1125](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1125))
-   cgroup ownership: clarify that some files may not exist ([#​1137](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1137))
-   typo: seccompFD -> seccompFd ([#​1133](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1133))
-   schema: update README.md ([#​1083](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1083))
-   schema: make with golang 1.16 ([#​1084](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1084))
-   Update Windows CPU comments ([#​1144](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1144))
-   specs-go: export LinuxBlockIODevice ([#​1103](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1103))
-   config-linux: update type of LinuxCPU.Idle to \*int64 ([#​1146](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1146))
-   fix RFC link ([#​1153](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1153))
-   Add available LinuxSeccompFlags ([#​1138](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1138))
-   maintainer updates as per ([#​1101](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1101) ([#​1150](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1150))
-   GOVERNANCE: correct the Charter URL ([#​1157](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1157))
-   CODEOWNERS: sync with MAINTAINERS ([#​1160](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1160))

</details>

---
